description: Rialto Pipeline Configuration - Copy to rialto_pipeline_config.json and customize

_comments.input_folder: Folder where Power Automate drops incoming PDFs
_comments.processed_folder: Successfully processed PDFs are moved here
_comments.failed_folder: Failed PDFs are moved here for review
_comments.live: Set to true for live execution (default: false = dry run)
_comments.confirm: Set to true to require confirmation before processing each PDF
_comments.daemon: Set to true for continuous monitoring mode
_comments.interval: Seconds between folder checks in daemon mode (default: 3600 = 1 hour)
_comments.workflow_settings: Alma workflow configuration - see RIALTO_WORKFLOW_README.md for valid values
